title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Natco Pharma

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Natco Pharma
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Natco Pharma in Nagpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Natco Pharma:
Natco Pharma is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Natco Pharma!
